name: Intercom
auth_notes: Uses bearer token authentication via API keys generated in the Developer Hub.
access_notes: Developers can access the Developer Hub to generate private apps and API keys for their own workspace independently.
api_notes: The REST API covers core objects like conversations, contacts, companies, articles, and admin management. Some newer AI features (Fin API platform) may have different access requirements.

evidence.claim: The Intercom REST API is a core platform component available for retrieving and updating account information.
The Fin API platform for specialized AI agents is gated behind a high-spend contract requirement.
Developers can generate private apps and get API keys via the Intercom Developer Hub.
Search citation: Intercom | The only helpdesk designed for the AI Agent era

one_liner: Intercom is a customer service platform and helpdesk that provides communication tools, AI agents, and a data platform for managing customer interactions.
blocker: Access to the specific 'Fin API platform' (for specialized AI agents) is reported to be gated for high-spend customers ($250k/year). Standard REST API remains generally accessible.
mcp_notes: No official or prominent community MCP server was found in the provided sources.
